message:
fix: pass configured credentials to verifyServerTarget instead of hardcoded root (bd-7lgi)

verifyServerTarget() was hardcoding DSN as 'root@tcp(...)/' with no password,
ignoring configured server credentials. When the Dolt server requires
authentication, the verification query would fail even though the actual
migration would succeed with correct credentials from migrationParams.

Add user and password parameters to verifyServerTarget() and use them in the
DSN, matching the pattern already used by verifyMigrationData(). Update the
caller in runMigrationPhases() to pass params.serverUser and
params.serverPassword.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
